title: Secure task routing demo (LocalHub, 1 coordinator, 3 workers)

hub.notes: In-process broker for routing encrypted envelopes; cannot decrypt payloads

flow.sequence: Coordinator sends three distinct tasks, one to each worker; each worker replies with a result to the coordinator using the same task_id.
flow.ordering: Prefer alternating task→result per worker, but sending all 3 tasks first followed by 3 results is acceptable.
flow.timestamps: Use integer milliseconds since epoch; ensure monotonic non-decreasing order across the transcript.

tasks.text: Index dataset ALPHA and report document count
Compute embeddings for file set BETA
Summarize incident report GAMMA in 2 sentences

security.replay_protection: Nonce + monotonic per-session counter to detect duplicates

notes: All agent_ids listed here must appear in identities.json and hub_stats.json.
transcript.jsonl must contain at least these 6 messages (3 tasks + 3 results).
Result messages must be addressed to coordinator.
